trades.name: AppLovin Corporation
trades.analysis: AppLovin is currently pulling back into the 0.618 Fibonacci retracement zone from its 52-week range. The current price of $513.44 is above the estimated 150-day moving average of $504.35, but below the 20-day MA of $533.13, indicating a short-term pullback within a longer-term positive trend. Relative volume is elevated at 1.42. There are no immediate earnings catalysts within the next 5 days.

trades.name: Red Cat Holdings, Inc.
trades.analysis: Red Cat Holdings is currently trading within the 0.5-0.618 Fibonacci retracement Golden Zone from its 52-week range. The current price of $11.92 is above the 20-day moving average of $11.46, but below the estimated 150-day MA of $12.16. Relative volume is below average at 0.67, indicating a lack of strong immediate interest. There are no immediate earnings catalysts within the next 5 days.
